positive: A stylized, highly detailed illustration of a whimsical forest gathering. The main subject is a friendly, stylized fox sitting upright, surrounded by glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and twisting, intricate roots. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on fabric. Use a limited color palette of deep emerald greens, cobalt blues, warm saffron yellow, and touches of glowing cyan for the bioluminescence. The art style must be neo-Victorian etching mixed with contemporary kawaii aesthetics, utilizing crisp, clean lines, high contrast silhouettes, and rich jewel tones. The background should provide depth without being distracting, allowing the fox and mushrooms to pop dramatically. Perfect for screen printing on natural fabric, with clean, solid shapes suitable for apparel.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, poorly drawn, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, sepia, low contrast
